title: fagelia parviflora
intro: Fagelia parviflora is a flowering plant, belonging to the family Rubiaceae, commonly found in tropical regions. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat various digestive issues, such as dysentery and diarrhea, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Fagelia parviflora include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate pain, and support the immune system. Fagelia parviflora can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and address various health concerns.
